steps.title: Identify what the claim requires
steps.content: The underlined claim describes amplifying a “distinct perspective not typically given a formal platform”—meaning the security personnel possess viewpoints that haven't been formally expressed publicly before.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: C demonstrates this directly: the curator developed a personal interpretation from overseeing the artworks that was “previously shared only in small impromptu conversations,” not formally—now the exhibition gives it a formal platform. The others either call the show “unique” without showing their perspective was previously unplatformed, focus on overlooked artworks rather than the security personnel's cuatorial viewpoint, or emphasize collaboration with professional staff rather than their distinct independent perspective. That matches choice C — C is correct.
